meaning: vt.重新补充人员,重新获得勇气
examples: Reman Services (244-7, Mal Serplet 87) beat Allscott (170, Ben Waters 55, Dominic Bradburne 3-34) by 74 runs.
An entertaining match saw Bomere Heath draw with last season's champions Reman Services.
In the Shropshire Premier League , Albrighton made a slight inroad into Reman's lead at the top of the table.
